text:
```json
[
  "Machine learning is a technology that enables computers to learn from data, make predictions or decisions without explicit programming, and classify information, mirroring human learning processes.",
  "Machine learning concepts form the foundation of many modern data-driven technologies and have broad applications across all industries, from financial projections to strategic decision-making.",
  "Machine learning is broadly categorized into supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning, with semi-supervised learning combining supervised and unsupervised techniques.",
  "Supervised learning trains models on labeled data to map inputs to target outputs, with common algorithms including linear regression, neural networks, support vector machines, and decision tree/random forest.",
  "Supervised learning applications include predictive analytics, sentiment analysis, and object or image recognition.",
  "Unsupervised learning trains algorithms on unlabeled data to independently identify patterns and structures, creating their own labels.",
  "Common unsupervised learning algorithms include principal component analysis, K-means clustering, and probabilistic clustering, used for detecting anomalies, segmenting customer bases, and powering recommendation engines.",
  "Reinforcement learning, described as a type of unsupervised learning, enables machines to learn through trial and error using a gamified reward system to determine the best method.",
  "Applications of reinforcement learning include market personalization, optimization, and financial predictions.",
  "Both machine learning and deep learning are types of AI, with deep learning being a specific type of machine learning.",
  "Deep learning specifically uses many layers of neural networks for complicated analyses, and its algorithms are sometimes called deep neural networks."
]
```
json_data: Machine learning is a technology that enables computers to learn from data, make predictions or decisions without explicit programming, and classify information, mirroring human learning processes.
Machine learning concepts form the foundation of many modern data-driven technologies and have broad applications across all industries, from financial projections to strategic decision-making.
Machine learning is broadly categorized into supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning, with semi-supervised learning combining supervised and unsupervised techniques.

Supervised learning trains models on labeled data to map inputs to target outputs, with common algorithms including linear regression, neural networks, support vector machines, and decision tree/random forest.
Supervised learning applications include predictive analytics, sentiment analysis, and object or image recognition.
Unsupervised learning trains algorithms on unlabeled data to independently identify patterns and structures, creating their own labels.

Common unsupervised learning algorithms include principal component analysis, K-means clustering, and probabilistic clustering, used for detecting anomalies, segmenting customer bases, and powering recommendation engines.
Reinforcement learning, described as a type of unsupervised learning, enables machines to learn through trial and error using a gamified reward system to determine the best method.
Applications of reinforcement learning include market personalization, optimization, and financial predictions.
Both machine learning and deep learning are types of AI, with deep learning being a specific type of machine learning.
Deep learning specifically uses many layers of neural networks for complicated analyses, and its algorithms are sometimes called deep neural networks.
